TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kainisungan Itiniay i Yanping Cen no Taitung ko Kainisungan a niyaro', 27 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 89 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 89% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 79 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 11% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 66%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 1%, Truku 6%, Rukai 1%, Tayal 4%, roma 6%.
S.PHON: kainiso~u~uŋan itiniaj i janpiŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kainiso~u~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~u~ukai *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Kainisungan Itiniay i Yanping Cen no Taitung ko Kainisungan a niyaro', 27 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 89 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 89% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 79 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 11% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 66%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 1%, Truku 6%, Rukai 1%, Tayal 4%, roma 6%.
S.PHON: kainiso~u~uŋan itiniaj i janpiŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kainiso~u~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~u~ukai *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%.
